name: Wedding Ceremony & Reception
description: A traditional wedding day from getting ready through the sparkler send-off — ceremony, cocktail hour, dinner, toasts, and dancing

steps.name: Hair & Makeup
steps.description: Bride and bridesmaids hair styling and makeup application

steps.name: Bride Gets Dressed
steps.description: Bride puts on wedding dress with help from bridesmaids and mother

steps.name: Groom Gets Ready
steps.description: Groom and groomsmen suit up, boutonnieres, final preparations

steps.name: Getting Ready Photos
steps.description: Candid shots of bride and groom preparing separately — detail shots of dress, rings, shoes, bouquet

steps.name: First Look
steps.description: Couple sees each other for the first time — private, emotional reveal moment

steps.name: Couple Portraits
steps.description: Formal and romantic portraits of the couple at scenic locations around the venue

steps.name: Wedding Party Photos
steps.description: Group photos with bridesmaids, groomsmen, and full wedding party

steps.name: Family Formal Photos
steps.description: Formal portraits with immediate family, parents, grandparents, and extended family groups

steps.name: Ceremony Venue Setup
steps.description: Set up chairs, aisle runner, arch/chuppah, floral arrangements, programs on seats

steps.name: Ceremony Musician Setup
steps.description: String quartet or musician sound check and setup

steps.name: Guest Seating
steps.description: Ushers seat guests — family to reserved front rows, friends choose a side or open seating

steps.name: Processional
steps.description: Officiant, groom, and groomsmen take positions; bridesmaids walk the aisle; flower girl and ring bearer; bride's entrance with escort

steps.name: Welcome & Opening Remarks
steps.description: Officiant welcomes guests, shares words about marriage and the couple

steps.name: Readings & Prayers
steps.description: Selected friends or family members share readings — poems, scripture, or personal selections

steps.name: Exchange of Vows
steps.description: Couple exchanges wedding vows — traditional or personally written promises to each other

steps.name: Ring Exchange
steps.description: Exchange of wedding rings with the traditional 'with this ring' declaration

steps.name: Unity Ceremony
steps.description: Sand pouring, candle lighting, handfasting, or other symbolic unity ritual

steps.name: The Kiss & Pronouncement
steps.description: Officiant pronounces the couple married — You may now kiss!

steps.name: Recessional
steps.description: Newlyweds walk back up the aisle together, followed by wedding party — guests cheer, toss petals or blow bubbles

steps.name: Cocktail Area Setup
steps.description: Set up bar stations, hors d'oeuvres displays, and lounge furniture

steps.name: Cocktail Hour
steps.description: Guests enjoy signature cocktails, passed hors d'oeuvres, and mingle while couple takes photos

steps.name: Reception Room Flip
steps.description: Transform ceremony space or prepare reception room — set tables, centerpieces, place cards, linens, lighting

steps.name: Cake & Dessert Display Setup
steps.description: Position wedding cake, set up dessert table, arrange cake topper and serving pieces

steps.name: DJ/Band Setup & Sound Check
steps.description: Set up speakers, lighting, microphones, test equipment, prepare playlists

steps.name: Grand Entrance & Introductions
steps.description: DJ announces wedding party one by one, then the newlyweds make their grand entrance to cheers and applause

steps.name: First Dance
steps.description: The newlyweds share their first dance as a married couple

steps.name: Welcome Toast & Blessing
steps.description: Father of the bride or host gives welcome speech, blessing or grace before dinner

steps.name: Dinner Service
steps.description: Plated dinner or buffet service — salad course, main course, and sides served to all guests

steps.name: Parent Dances
steps.description: Father-daughter dance followed by mother-son dance — guests watch from their seats

steps.name: Cake Cutting
steps.description: Couple cuts the wedding cake together — traditional first bite feeding each other

steps.name: Bouquet Toss
steps.description: Bride tosses her bouquet to unmarried guests gathered on the dance floor

steps.name: Garter Toss
steps.description: Groom removes and tosses the garter to unmarried guests

steps.name: Open Dancing
steps.description: Dance floor opens to all guests — DJ plays mix of crowd favorites, requests, and era-spanning hits

steps.name: Last Dance
steps.description: Final slow dance for the couple as DJ invites all guests to join for the last song of the evening

steps.name: Sparkler Send-Off
steps.description: Guests line up with sparklers forming a tunnel — couple runs through to their getaway car amid cheers and sparkles

steps.name: Maid of Honor Toast
steps.description: Maid of honor gives heartfelt and often humorous speech about the bride and couple

steps.name: Best Man Toast
steps.description: Best man delivers his speech — stories, well-wishes, and a toast to the couple

steps.name: Anniversary Dance
steps.description: All married couples join the floor — couples sit as their anniversary year is called until the longest-married couple remains

steps.name: Dessert & Coffee Service
steps.description: Serve wedding cake slices, dessert table opens — mini pastries, cookies, coffee and tea station

steps.name: Late Night Snack Station
steps.description: Pizza, sliders, or comfort food station opens for dancing guests needing fuel
